assembly_instructions: Real-scale ('bed-slinger') Prusa i3 MK3S+. The Y-axis base is a 500 mm long rectangular frame built from four 2020 aluminium extrusions (two rails + front/rear cross-bars); two 8 mm M8 smooth rods run along the rails and carry the Y-carriage. The magnetic MK52 heatbed sits on the carriage under a removable PEI-coated spring-steel print sheet. At the rear, a single laser-cut aluminium sheet forms the vertical frame and cantilevers the X-Z gantry: two 10 mm smooth Z-rods and two T8 lead screws, driven by two NEMA17 Z motors at the top of the frame, carry a 2020 X-axis extrusion. The X-carriage rides on the extrusion with the MK3S+ direct-drive extruder hanging forward — NEMA17 E motor on its face, Bondtech feeder, E3D V6 heatblock, 0.4 mm brass nozzle, SuperPINDA probe. The Einsy RAMBo case is bolted to the right side of the frame with the LCD and rotary encoder on its face; the 1 kg filament spool sits on a holder atop the frame. 250 × 210 × 210 mm build volume.

info.english_name: Original Prusa i3 MK3S+ FDM 3D Printer
info.summary: Flagship open-source bed-slinger FDM printer from Prusa Research. 250×210×210 mm build volume, direct-drive Bondtech extruder, magnetic removable spring-steel sheet, filament and power-loss sensors.
info.description: The Original Prusa i3 MK3S+ is the production workhorse of the Prusa i3 family — itself the longest-running open-source derivative of Josef Prusa's original RepRap i3. The printer follows the classic 'bed-slinger' kinematics: the heat bed moves on the Y axis along two parallel M8 smooth rods on a 2020 aluminium base, while a cantilevered single-sheet aluminium frame at the rear carries the XZ gantry. Two Z-motors with T8 lead screws raise and lower the X-extrusion; the X-carriage rides on the extrusion and carries the MK3S+ direct-drive extruder with a Bondtech dual-gear feeder, an E3D V6-compatible hotend, and a 0.4 mm brass nozzle. The removable magnetic spring-steel PEI sheet on top of the heated bed lets prints pop off by flexing. A SuperPINDA probe handles mesh bed levelling; an IR filament sensor and power-panic detection are built into the extruder. Firmware, electronics (Einsy RAMBo with TMC2130 drivers), and full CAD are released on GitHub — the printer is one of the most-cloned FDM designs in existence.
info.operator: Prusa Research customers + the wider open FDM community
info.contractor: Prusa Research (Josef Prusa et al., Prague)
info.contract_date: MK3S released Feb 2019 · MK3S+ upgrade released Oct 2020
info.status: In production through MK4/MK4S successor; MK3S+ still sold / upgradable

facts.label: Heat bed
facts.value: MK52 magnetic base + removable PEI-coated spring-steel sheet

facts.label: Axes
facts.value: X: 2020 extrusion · Y: 2× M8 smooth rods · Z: 2× lead screws + 2× smooth rods

facts.label: Electronics
facts.value: Einsy RAMBo, TMC2130 stealthChop drivers, IR filament sensor, SuperPINDA

sources.title: Prusa Research — i3 MK3S+ knowledge base

parts.name: Y-Axis Rail (Left, 2020)
parts.role: Left 2020 aluminium extrusion forming one side of the Y-axis base.

parts.name: Y-Axis Rail (Right, 2020)
parts.role: Right 2020 aluminium extrusion forming the other side of the Y-axis base.

parts.name: Y-Axis Front Cross-Bar
parts.role: Front cross-member tying the two Y-axis rails together and rooting the frame feet.

parts.name: Y-Axis Rear Cross-Bar
parts.role: Rear cross-member. Also anchors the base of the vertical frame and the Y motor.

parts.name: Y-Axis Smooth Rod (Left, 8 mm)
parts.role: Hardened 8 mm linear rod — one of two that guide the Y-carriage.

parts.name: Y-Axis Smooth Rod (Right, 8 mm)
parts.role: Hardened 8 mm linear rod — the second Y-axis guide.

parts.name: Y-Carriage
parts.role: Aluminium plate that rides on the M8 rods. Carries the heatbed assembly and links to the Y belt.

parts.name: MK52 Magnetic Heat Bed
parts.role: Heated aluminium PCB + magnetic top layer that grabs the removable spring-steel print sheet.

parts.name: PEI Spring-Steel Print Sheet
parts.role: Removable, flexible spring-steel sheet coated with PEI. Prints pop off by flexing the sheet.

parts.name: Aluminium Frame
parts.role: Laser-cut single-sheet aluminium frame standing vertically at the rear of the Y base. Cantilevers the X/Z axes.

parts.name: Z-Axis Smooth Rod (Left, 10 mm)
parts.role: Left 10 mm Z-axis smooth rod — guides the X-extrusion up and down.

parts.name: Z-Axis Smooth Rod (Right, 10 mm)
parts.role: Right Z-axis smooth rod.

parts.name: Z-Axis Lead Screw (Left, T8)
parts.role: T8 trapezoidal lead screw — drives the left side of the X-extrusion vertically.

parts.name: Z-Axis Lead Screw (Right, T8)
parts.role: Right T8 lead screw.

parts.name: NEMA17 Z Motor (Left)
parts.role: Left Z-axis NEMA17 stepper at the top of the frame.

parts.name: NEMA17 Z Motor (Right)
parts.role: Right Z-axis NEMA17 stepper.

parts.name: X-Axis Extrusion (2020)
parts.role: Horizontal 2020 extrusion that rides up/down on the Z rods and carries the X-carriage.

parts.name: X-Carriage
parts.role: Printed PETG carriage — slides along the X extrusion and bolts to the extruder.

parts.name: NEMA17 X Motor
parts.role: NEMA17 X motor at the right end of the X extrusion — drives the X-carriage via a GT2 belt.

parts.name: MK3S+ Direct-Drive Extruder
parts.role: Bondtech dual-gear direct-drive extruder body. Houses filament path, drive gears, and hotend mount.

parts.name: NEMA17 E Motor
parts.role: NEMA17 stepper on the extruder face — drives the Bondtech feeder gears directly.

parts.name: IR Filament Sensor
parts.role: IR optical sensor inside the extruder — detects filament presence and feed failure.

parts.name: E3D V6 Hotend Heatblock
parts.role: Brass/aluminium heater block with a 40 W cartridge and a thermistor.

parts.name: Hotend Nozzle (0.4 mm brass)
parts.role: 0.4 mm brass nozzle. Swappable for other diameters and hardened variants.

parts.name: SuperPINDA Probe
parts.role: Temperature-compensated inductive probe next to the hotend — drives automatic mesh bed levelling.

parts.name: NEMA17 Y Motor
parts.role: NEMA17 Y motor at the rear of the base — drives the Y-carriage belt.

parts.name: Einsy RAMBo Case
parts.role: Controller enclosure bolted to the right side of the frame. Holds the Einsy board with TMC2130 drivers.

parts.name: LCD + Encoder
parts.role: Monochrome LCD with rotary/click encoder on the front face of the Einsy case.

parts.name: Spool Holder Bracket
parts.role: Bracket on top of the frame — pivots the filament-spool axle.

parts.name: Filament Spool (1 kg)
parts.role: Standard 1 kg filament spool. Feeds down and forward into the extruder.
